title: orthogonals preflight --json
description: Host readiness verdicts. The process exit code follows the overall status: 0 pass, 2 warn, 1 fail.

status.description: The most severe status among the checks.

name.description: Stable check identifier, safe to match on.

message.description: Human-readable finding. Not a stable contract; match on name.

remedy.description: What to do about it; present only when the status is not pass.
